Análise Exploratória - Malária

# Pacotes transformação de dados
install.packages(c("tidyverse", "lubridate"))

# Pacotes plotagem
install.packages(c("geobr","sf","ggplot2","dplyr"))

library(tidyverse)
library(lubridate)
library(geobr)
library(sf)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
load("malaria_2016.RData")
malaria_2016 <- data

load("malaria_2017.RData")
malaria_2017 <- data

load("malaria_2018.RData")
malaria_2018 <- data

load("malaria_2019.RData")
malaria_2019 <- data

ls()
[1] "data"         "malaria_2016" "malaria_2017" "malaria_2018"
[5] "malaria_2019"
malaria <- bind_rows(
  malaria_2016,
  malaria_2017,
  malaria_2018,
  malaria_2019
)
glimpse(malaria)
Rows: 6,391,535
Columns: 40
$ infection.county      <fct> 110001, 110001, 110001, 110001, 110001, 1…

$ infection.state       <fct> RO, RO, RO, RO, RO, RO, RO, RO, RO, RO, R…
$ notification.state    <fct> RO, RO, RO, RO, RO, RO, RO, RO, RO, RO, R…
$ home.country          <fct> Brazil, Brazil, Brazil, Brazil, Brazil, B…
$ infection.country     <fct> Brazil, Brazil, Brazil, Brazil, Brazil, B…
$ migration             <fct> no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, n…
$ autochthonous.case    <fct> yes, yes, yes, yes, no, yes, yes, yes, no…
$ age                   <ord> 55 to 64 years old, 35 to 44 years old, 3…
$ notification.month    <ord> 11, 03, 07, 07, 09, 11, 11, 02, 10, 04, 0…
$ notification.year     <ord> 2016, 2016, 2016, 2016, 2016, 2016, 2016,…
$ exam.month            <ord> 11, 03, 07, 07, 09, 11, 11, 02, 10, 04, 0…
$ exam.year             <ord> 2016, 2016, 2016, 2016, 2016, 2016, 2016,…
$ treatment.month       <ord> 11, 03, 07, 07, 09, 11, 11, NA, 10, 04, 0…
$ treatment.year        <ord> 2016, 2016, 2016, 2016, 2016, 2016, 2016,…
$ symptom.month         <ord> 11, 02, 07, 07, 09, 10, 11, NA, 09, 04, 0…
$ symptom.year          <ord> 2016, 2016, 2016, 2016, 2016, 2016, 2016,…
$ exam.interval         <ord> on the same day, on the same day, on the …
$ treatment.interval    <ord> on the same day, on the same day, on the …
$ notification.interval <ord> 1 to 7 days, 1 to 7 days, 1 to 7 days, 1 …
$ previous.treatment    <fct> no, no, no, vivax, no, no, no, no, no, no…
# Transformação de tipagem de colunas
malaria <- malaria %>%
  mutate(
    notification.month = as.numeric(as.character(notification.month)),
    notification.year = as.numeric(as.character(notification.year)),
    exam.month = as.numeric(as.character(exam.month)),
    exam.year = as.numeric(as.character(exam.year)),
    treatment.month = as.numeric(as.character(treatment.month)),
    treatment.year = as.numeric(as.character(treatment.year)),
    symptom.month = as.numeric(as.character(symptom.month)),
    symptom.year = as.numeric(as.character(symptom.year))
  )
glimpse(malaria)
Rows: 6,391,535
Columns: 40
$ infection.county      <fct> 110001, 110001, 110001, 110001, 110001, 1…

$ detection.type        <fct> active, active, active, active, active, a…

$ pregnancy             <fct> not applicable, no, ignored gestational ,…
$ crosses               <ord> one cross, one cross, one cross, less tha…
$ cvl.case              <fct> no, no, no, yes, no, no, no, no, no, no, …
$ home.state            <fct> RO, RO, RO, RO, RO, RO, RO, RO, RO, RO, R…
$ infection.state       <fct> RO, RO, RO, RO, RO, RO, RO, RO, RO, RO, R…
$ notification.state    <fct> RO, RO, RO, RO, RO, RO, RO, RO, RO, RO, R…
$ home.country          <fct> Brazil, Brazil, Brazil, Brazil, Brazil, B…
$ infection.country     <fct> Brazil, Brazil, Brazil, Brazil, Brazil, B…
$ migration             <fct> no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, n…
$ autochthonous.case    <fct> yes, yes, yes, yes, no, yes, yes, yes, no…
$ age                   <ord> 55 to 64 years old, 35 to 44 years old, 3…
$ notification.month    <dbl> 11, 3, 7, 7, 9, 11, 11, 2, 10, 4, 1, 11, …
$ notification.year     <dbl> 2016, 2016, 2016, 2016, 2016, 2016, 2016,…
$ exam.month            <dbl> 11, 3, 7, 7, 9, 11, 11, 2, 10, 4, 1, 11, …
$ exam.year             <dbl> 2016, 2016, 2016, 2016, 2016, 2016, 2016,…
$ treatment.month       <dbl> 11, 3, 7, 7, 9, 11, 11, NA, 10, 4, 1, 11,…
$ treatment.year        <dbl> 2016, 2016, 2016, 2016, 2016, 2016, 2016,…
$ symptom.month         <dbl> 11, 2, 7, 7, 9, 10, 11, NA, 9, 4, 1, 11, …
$ symptom.year          <dbl> 2016, 2016, 2016, 2016, 2016, 2016, 2016,…
$ exam.interval         <ord> on the same day, on the same day, on the …
$ treatment.interval    <ord> on the same day, on the same day, on the …
$ notification.interval <ord> 1 to 7 days, 1 to 7 days, 1 to 7 days, 1 …
$ previous.treatment    <fct> no, no, no, vivax, no, no, no, no, no, no…
malaria <- malaria %>%
  filter(notification.year >= 2016 & notification.year <= 2019)
malaria <- malaria %>%
  distinct()
malaria <- malaria %>%
  mutate(
    notification.date = as.Date(
      paste(notification.year, notification.month, "01", sep="-")
    )
  )
unique(malaria$exam.result)
 [1] vivax          negative       falciparum     non falciparum
 [5] F+V            V+FG           F+FG           FG            
 [9] F+M            malariae       <NA>          
11 Levels: negative falciparum F+FG vivax F+V V+FG FG malariae ... non falciparum
malaria <- malaria %>%
  mutate(
    malaria.type = case_when(
      exam.result == "negative" ~ "Negativo",
      exam.result == "vivax" ~ "Vivax",
      exam.result == "falciparum" ~ "Falciparum",
      TRUE ~ "Outros"
    )
  )
total_brasil <- nrow(malaria)


estado_resumo <- malaria %>%
  mutate(
    positive = exam.result != "negative"
  ) %>%
  group_by(notification.state) %>%
  summarise(
    positivos = sum(positive, na.rm = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  mutate(percentual = positivos/total_brasil*100)
br_states <- read_state()

Download status: 0 done; 27 in progress (0 b/s). Total size: 2.61 Kb (??%)...
Download status: 1 done; 26 in progress (458.75 Kb/s). Total size: 740.12 Kb (??%)...
Download status: 11 done; 16 in progress (274.19 Kb/s). Total size: 2.09 Mb (??%)...
Download status: 24 done; 3 in progress (3.51 Kb/s). Total size: 3.74 Mb (??%)...
Download status: 27 done; 0 in progress. Total size: 4.19 Mb (288%)... done!             
estado_resumo <- estado_resumo %>%
  rename(abbrev_state = notification.state)
mapa <- br_states %>%
  left_join(estado_resumo, by="abbrev_state")
ggplot(mapa) +
  geom_sf(aes(fill = percentual)) +
  scale_fill_viridis_c(option="plasma", na.value="grey90") +
  labs(
    title = "Distribuição espacial da proporção de casos positivos\n de malária no Brasil (2016–2019)",
    fill = "Percentual (%)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal() + 
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5)
  )

total_brasil

[1] 936719
unique(malaria$notification.state)

[1] RO AM MT MA AC PA AP RR TO
Levels: RO AC AM RR PA AP TO MA MT
malaria <- malaria %>%
  mutate(
    exam.binary = ifelse(exam.result == "negative", "Negativo", "Positivo")
  )
casos_tempo <- malaria %>%
  group_by(notification.date, malaria.type) %>%
  summarise(
    total = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  )
ggplot(casos_tempo,
       aes(x = notification.date,
           y = total,
           color = malaria.type)) +
  geom_line(size = 1) +
  labs(
    title = "Evolução dos tipos de malária (2016–2019)",
    x = "Data",
    y = "Número de exames",
    color = "Resultado"
  ) +
  theme_minimal() + 
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5)
  )
